citations: LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript.
payload.reason: The proposal is an entire raw transcript-sized conversation_summary rather than a concise, durable memory. It is too voluminous, likely contains transient conversational detail, and is not an appropriate stable memory unit.
